SEARCH
Package jGameLib.ecs

Class Entity

java.lang.Object
jGameLib.ecs.Entity
Direct Known Subclasses:
BackgroundMusicEntity, UIEntity, UserInputHandlerEntity
public class Entity extends Object
Represents an object that has Components and can be acted upon by JSystems. Entities stick around forever in a list in their containing state until they are explicitly destroy()ed.

    destroy()
    Removes an Entity from its containing GameState.
    void
    disable()
    Disables the entity until enable() is called, preventing it from participating in any JSystems
    void
    enable()
    Enables the entity to participate in JSystems.
    final <Type extends Component>
    Collection<@NotNull Type>
    getAllComponents(Class<Type> type)
    Returns a collection of all the Components on this entity that are instances of the given class (including subclasses).
    final <Type extends Component>
    Type
    getComponent(Class<Type> type)
    Returns a Component on this Entity that is an instance of the given class (including subclasses) if one exists, otherwise throws an error.

    boolean

    Checks whether an instance of the given Component class (including subclasses) exists on this entity

    Checks whether this entity is enabled.
    String
    toString()
     
    final <Type extends Component>
    Entity
    withAllComponents(Class<Type> type, Consumer<Type> action)
    Runs an action on each Component returned by getAllComponents(Class) and returns this entity.
    final <Type extends Component>
    Entity
    withComponent(Class<Type> type, Consumer<Type> action)
    Runs an action on the Component returned by getComponent(Class) and returns this entity.

  • Field Details

    • state

      protected final GameState state

  • Constructor Details

    • Entity

      public Entity(GameState state)
      Constructs an Entity with its containing GameState

  • Method Details

    • destroy

      public void destroy()
      Removes an Entity from its containing GameState. After this method is called, you should never use this entity again, and the entity will not participate in any JSystem runs

    • cast

      public final <T extends Entity> T cast()
      A utility method for casting to a subclass, for easier use when method chaining

    • cast

      public final <T extends Entity> T cast(Class<T> cls)
      A utility method for casting to a subclass, for easier use when method chaining

    • addComponent

      public final Entity addComponent(Component component)
      Adds a Component to the Entity. You can later access the component through calling getComponent(Class) or getAllComponents(Class) using the class of the component or any of its superclasses up and including to the Component class

    • addComponents

      public final Entity addComponents(Component... components)
      Adds multiple Components to the Entity. See addComponent(Component) for more details

    • getComponent

      @NotNull public final <Type extends Component> Type getComponent(Class<Type> type)
      Returns a Component on this Entity that is an instance of the given class (including subclasses) if one exists, otherwise throws an error. If multiple components exist, no guarantee is made on which is returned; if you need to access all components of the given class, use getAllComponents(Class)

    • getAllComponents

      public final <Type extends Component> Collection<@NotNull Type> getAllComponents(Class<Type> type)
      Returns a collection of all the Components on this entity that are instances of the given class (including subclasses).

    • hasComponent

      public final <Type extends Component> boolean hasComponent(Class<Type> type)
      Checks whether an instance of the given Component class (including subclasses) exists on this entity

    • withComponent

      public final <Type extends Component> Entity withComponent(Class<Type> type, Consumer<Type> action)
      Runs an action on the Component returned by getComponent(Class) and returns this entity. Useful when method chaining.

    • withAllComponents

      public final <Type extends Component> Entity withAllComponents(Class<Type> type, Consumer<Type> action)
      Runs an action on each Component returned by getAllComponents(Class) and returns this entity. Useful when method chaining.

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Checks whether this entity is enabled. If the entity is not enabled, it will not participate in any systems.

    • enable

      public void enable()
      Enables the entity to participate in JSystems.

    • disable

      public void disable()
      Disables the entity until enable() is called, preventing it from participating in any JSystems

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
